programme.title: J-MELO

programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. I want to see my owner again! Charo starts his adventure back home.
programme.title: Little Charo

programme.desc: Service Areas Japanology Plus Mini
programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini

programme.desc: Oita: Warming Up in Yufuin Wildlife photographer and filmmaker Iwago Mitsuaki records the cute antics of cats he encounters in various picturesque locations across Japan.
programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Nagoya, Aichi The host embarks on a journey across Japan to explore the food culture surrounding one of its most popular dishes: ramen.
programme.title: Ramen Japan

programme.desc: Stone Jizo: Neighbourhood Guardians Watch Over Children Children gather at the street corners where Jizo statues stand for lively festivities. People pray for the health and success of their children during this cornerstone of faith.
programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini

programme.desc: Adjusting a Schedule With a Client Foreigners learn useful Japanese workplace expressions, explore business cultures and improve kanji proficiency.
programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work

programme.desc: Pottery Island A look at the people around Japan who strive for a life without waste under the traditional philosophy of Mottainai.
programme.title: Zero Waste Life

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: San Miguel de Allende, Mexico The host travels to various cities around the world to explore tourist attractions and monuments and speaks to the local people there.
programme.title: Somewhere Street

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Learning More Than Skills From Woodblock Prints David Bull talks about coming to Japan to master the art of woodblock printing and learning valuable lessons about Japanese culture.
programme.title: Chatroom Japan

programme.desc: Data Centers: The New Surge in CO2 Emissions Experts use scientific data and the latest discoveries to analyze the impact of global warming and explore potential solutions.
programme.title: IMPACTS:Climates Change the World

programme.desc: 300-Year-Old Communication Fashion designer Miyamae Yoshiyuki visits Kochi's Sunday market to discover how communication strengthens the local community.
programme.title: Design Museum Japan

programme.desc: Globe Factory The team explores a factory in Saitama making globes for educational use and much more besides; see the skill it takes to turn flat maps into spherical globes and what in the world is an AR globe?
programme.title: The Factory Wonders

programme.desc: TOSA: Wings of a Mayfly The filmmakers explore Tosa's natural landscape and witness washi artisans at work, creating the world's thinnest washi paper.
programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Summer Solstice / The 24 Solar Terms Videographer Koichi Hozan captures a field of Asian lizard's tail in full bloom in Okada Valley.
programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato

programme.desc: Disaster Response Robots Lemi Duncan sheds light on sophisticated robots that can help rescue survivors, enter dangerous sites and provide detailed data in the aftermath of a major disaster.
programme.title: BOSAI: Science That Can Save Your Life

A widowed lawyer with two bright children defends a black man falsely accused of raping a white woman in the 1930s Alabama.
programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird

programme.desc: A New Yorker and her four sons experience love and laughter from their opinionated but well-meaning family patriarch.
programme.title: Life With Father

programme.desc: Slapstick comedy from Larry, Moe, Curly and occasionally Shemp.
programme.title: The Three Stooges

programme.desc: S01 E09 — Husbands Once Removed Without a marriage certificate to prove they're married, Blondie takes advantage of the situation to make Dagwood court her a second time.
programme.title: Blondie

programme.desc: White liberals must overcome their own latent racism when their strong-willed daughter announces her intention to marry a distinguished black physician.
programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner

programme.desc: A witch's (Kim Novak) warlock brother (Jack Lemmon) helps a San Francisco publisher (James Stewart) break a love spell.
programme.title: Bell, Book and Candle

programme.desc: Little Alice (Fiona Fullerton) falls into a strange land and meets the White Rabbit (Michael Crawford), March Hare (Peter Sellers) and other odd characters out of Lewis Carroll's story.
programme.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

programme.desc: A lawyer (Ginger Rogers) bails out and then marries a Hollywood tough guy (Jack Carson) who's a milquetoast in real life.
programme.title: The Groom Wore Spurs

programme.desc: Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm and eases on down the road to see the Wiz with Tin Man, Scarecrow and Cowardly Lion.
programme.title: The Wiz

programme.desc: A teenager (Tuesday Weld) wants to wear a strapless gown to the prom.
programme.title: Rock, Rock, Rock!

programme.desc: A reporter writes a fictitious column about a man named John Doe, who claims to despair at America's neglect of the little people and plans to kill himself. To maintain the ruse, the newspaper hires a ballplayer-turned-hobo to pose as John Doe.
programme.title: Meet John Doe

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats.
programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet

programme.desc: An outlaw is left by his cohorts and girlfriend to be captured after he is wounded during a heist. When he is released from prison, he tracks his old crew to a run-down town and plays a game of cat and mouse with them.
programme.title: Gun the Man Down

programme.desc: The track star's life unfolds, as a court-ordered parole officer investigates his past.
programme.title: The Jesse Owens Story

programme.desc: Several would-be heirs are forced to spend a night in a haunted house in order to collect their inheritance.
programme.title: The Cat and the Canary

programme.desc: A detective (Peter O'Toole) helps a French art forger's daughter (Audrey Hepburn) steal a fake Venus.
programme.title: How to Steal a Million

programme.desc: Poor white tenant farmers (Zachary Scott, Betty Field, Beulah Bondi) battle fierce odds to make a living on a Texas plot.
programme.title: The Southerner

programme.desc: Mickey Spillane's private eye Mike Hammer follows bad guys and blondes to a smoking box.
programme.title: Kiss Me Deadly

programme.desc: A Los Angeles policeman (Van Heflin) has an affair and becomes obsessed with an all-night disc jockey's wife (Evelyn Keyes).
programme.title: The Prowler

programme.desc: Mickey Spillane's private eye Mike Hammer follows bad guys and blondes to a smoking box.
programme.title: Kiss Me Deadly

programme.desc: A bachelor (Jerry Lewis) agrees to baby-sit for a Hollywood star (Marilyn Maxwell), who turns out to have triplets.
programme.title: Rock-a-Bye Baby

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his Bar-20 buddies stop a saloon owner (Evelyn Brent) and her rustler partner (Victor Jory).
programme.title: Wide Open Town

programme.desc: A lumber tycoon (Kirk Douglas) wants the California redwoods, but a religious homesteader (Eve Miller) changes his mind.
programme.title: The Big Trees

programme.desc: An ex-convict bandit (Marlon Brando) finds the partner (Karl Malden) who betrayed him is now a town sheriff with a wife (Katy Jurado) and daughter.
programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks

programme.desc: Capt. Jones (Anthony Hopkins), William Brewster (Richard Crenna), Priscilla Mullins (Jenny Agutter) and company have a rough trip on the Mayflower.
programme.title: Mayflower: The Pilgrims' Adventure

programme.desc: The muscular hero forms Ursa Major and fights space robots to save a princess who has been kidnapped.
programme.title: Hercules

programme.desc: Secret agent Matt Helm (Dean Martin) and a blonde (Sharon Tate) track $1 billion in gold in the last of four Matt Helm movies.
programme.title: The Wrecking Crew

programme.desc: Blue-collar buddies (Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby) search the underworld for a winning lottery ticket lost in a nightclub holdup.
programme.title: Uptown Saturday Night

programme.desc: An American secret agent tries to retrieve a roll of microfilm in South Africa before it falls into communist hands.
programme.title: The Cape Town Affair

programme.desc: After being fired from his office job, Harold Diddlebock (Harold Lloyd) gets drunk, goes on a wild binge, and buys a near-bankrupt circus.
programme.title: The Sin of Harold Diddlebock

programme.desc: A Supreme Court justice on a duck-hunting foray becomes involved in serious trouble with the citizens in a small town.
programme.title: A Stranger in Town

programme.desc: Kipling's boy hero Mowgli (Sabu), lost in the jungle, is adopted by animals and taught how they talk.
programme.title: Jungle Book

programme.desc: A newspaper editor (Jeffrey Lynn) blasts big business, then needs a big-business man's (Donald Crisp) help.
programme.title: Home Town Story

programme.desc: A lusty Greek peasant (Anthony Quinn) shows a British writer (Alan Bates) how to live and run a lignite mine.
programme.title: Zorba the Greek

programme.desc: Blondie and Dagwood Bumstead (Penny Singleton, Arthur Lake) lose Baby Dumpling (Larry Simms) as well as Daisy the dog.
programme.title: Blondie Brings Up Baby

programme.desc: Veterans of the 82nd Airborne Division devise an elaborate plot to simultaneously rob five casinos on New Year's Eve.
programme.title: Ocean's Eleven

programme.desc: A widowed lawyer with two bright children defends a black man falsely accused of raping a white woman in the 1930s Alabama.
programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird

programme.desc: Buffalo Bill (Roy Rogers) and the cavalry protect mining surveyors from Indians in New Mexico.
programme.title: Young Buffalo Bill

programme.desc: A rancher's (John Wayne) wife (Maureen O'Hara) summons him home to hunt down the outlaw (Richard Boone) and gang who kidnapped his grandson.
programme.title: Big Jake

programme.desc: A novitiate leaves her convent and becomes governess to Capt. Von Trapp's seven children in Austria before World War II.
programme.title: The Sound of Music

programme.desc: Slapstick comedy from Larry, Moe, Curly and occasionally Shemp.
programme.title: The Three Stooges

programme.desc: S06 E06 — Lucy Gets Jack Benny's Account Lucy designs a vault in an attempt to get Jack Benny's account.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: Adm. Kirk (William Shatner), Mr. Spock (Leonard Nimoy), Dr. McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and crew embark in the overhauled Enterprise to find an intelligent entity called VGER.
programme.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture

programme.desc: A woman (Lizabeth Scott) kills her husband and plots with a private eye (Dan Duryea) after someone tosses a moneybag into her car.
programme.title: Too Late for Tears

programme.desc: Socialite Irene Bullock needs a forgotten man to win a scavenger hunt and finds Godfrey Park, who resides in a dump by the East River. She hires him as a butler, to the chagrin of her spoiled sister Cornelia, who seeks to get Godfrey fired.
programme.title: My Man Godfrey

programme.title: Manna Fest with Perry Stone

programme.title: Hour of Liberation

programme.desc: Daily news from the State of Israel.

programme.desc: S01 E202 — The Cave of Machpelah Academy Award winner Jon Voight and his companions meet with Dr. Noam Arnon, who led the archeological team into The Cave of Machpelah in Hebron, where he discovered ancient artifacts from the age of Abraham.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Establishment of Beersheba Abraham, now secure in his camp, plants a shade tree and sets up a kind of roadside inn where he hosts travelers to teach them about his G-d.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: Over 100 years after being trapped by ice in 1915, the Ernest Shackleton expedition ship The Endurance was discovered sunken off the coast of Antarctica, with the story of Frank Hurley, the photographer on the voyage where all crew members survived.
programme.title: The Life and Work of Frank Hurley

programme.desc: Over summer break, the Davidson College Men's Basketball Team tours the Auschwitz Concentration Camp with a Holocaust survivor, Eva Kor, who with her twin sister was subjected to barbaric medical experiments by Auschwitz Dr. Josef Mengele.
programme.title: Davidson Basketball Visits Auschwitz

programme.desc: The 1972 Munich Olympics marked one of the darkest moments in Jewish athletic history when terrorists took 11 Israelis hostage. Canadian Olympic Swimmer Karen James shares her firsthand account of an Olympiad the world can never forget.
programme.title: Witness to Munich: The Karen James Story

programme.desc: Adaeze connects with her Nigerian heritage, and Lenny experiments with sweet cream and kola nut for a new customer's surprise engagement party.
programme.title: It's a Sweet World
